title: PMWeather Connected Glass
description: Adds Connected Glass Textures for ProtoManly's Weather Mod Reinforced Glass
body:
###
[ v1.1 ]
This Resource Pack added connected textures for Reinforced Glass and Glass Panes in [ProtoManly's Weather Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather) ![Looking Through the glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/duB0vUrg/images/bd46ec3089b57834daa5957699fb5de776b39206.png) This pack will do nothing on its own, use [Opitfine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) with [ProtoManly's Weather Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather) to take advantage of this pack.     Also check out [Essentially Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/essentially-tweaked)
